resultList.dtldesc: Grand 4 BHK Villa for Sale in Tukkuguda, HyderabadDiscover an impressive opportunity to own a spacious 4 BHK villa in the rapidly developing locality of Tukkuguda, Hyderabad. Designed to reflect scale, comfort, and future potential, this under-construction residence offers expansive interiors, freehold ownership, and a strategic location near key connectivity corridors, making it ideal for families seeking a premium independent home.Property SpecificationsThis east-facing villa spans a super built-up area of 4,250 sq. ft and is planned across a G plus 2 configuration, providing generous vertical distribution of living spaces. The layout comprises four well-appointed bedrooms, seven bathrooms, and three balconies, ensuring privacy and convenience for larger families or multi-generational living. The combined living and dining area forms a spacious central zone, ideal for both everyday living and entertaining guests.The villa is offered unfurnished, presenting a blank canvas for bespoke interior design and personalised finishes. Vitrified flooring enhances durability and lends a clean, modern appearance throughout the home. The kitchen is designed in a standard layout, allowing flexibility for future modular enhancements. The structure overlooks the main road as well as internal community views, ensuring openness and accessibility.The property includes two covered parking spaces along with a private garage and designated visitor parking, offering ample vehicle accommodation. With permission for two floors of construction and a G plus 2 layout already planned, the villa balances scale with structural clarity. The home is approved by the Hyderabad Metropolitan Development Authority and holds freehold ownership, reinforcing clear legal standing and long-term security.FacilitiesResidents benefit from 24-hour water availability and minimal power interruptions, supporting uninterrupted daily routines. The independent villa format offers enhanced privacy compared to apartment living, while planned infrastructure ensures organised access and movement. The availability of covered parking, private garage space, and visitor parking adds significant functional value. Being under construction, the property reflects modern building standards and contemporary structural planning.LocalitySituated in Tukkuguda, Hyderabad, the villa enjoys proximity to ORR Exit 4, ensuring strong connectivity to major parts of the city and surrounding commercial zones. The area is witnessing steady residential growth, supported by improving infrastructure and expanding civic amenities. Educational institutions, healthcare centres, supermarkets, and banking facilities are accessible within reasonable distance. With its strategic location near the Outer Ring Road, expansive built-up area, and freehold status, this villa presents a compelling opportunity for upscale residential living in Hyderabad.

resultList.dtldesc: Property Details::::A luxurious 3 BHK apartment is available for sale in Nagarjuna Residency, Gachibowli, Hyderabad. Situated on the second floor of a nine storey tower, this ready to move residence offers a spacious carpet area of 2500 sq ft and is ideal for families seeking a premium lifestyle. The semi furnished apartment comprises three bedrooms, three bathrooms, and three balconies that provide abundant natural light and ventilation. The home comes with the added convenience of three covered parking spaces and enjoys a favorable west facing orientation. Located in the heart of Gachibowli, opposite Nasr Boys School, the property offers excellent connectivity and a prestigious address.::::Property Specifications::::Designed with elegance and functionality in mind, the apartment features premium vitrified flooring throughout the interiors. The spacious layout includes well planned living and dining areas along with a modern island kitchen that enhances convenience and aesthetics. The semi furnished setup allows buyers to personalize the interiors according to their preferences. Two lifts provide easy access to the residence, while the thoughtfully designed spaces ensure a comfortable and luxurious living experience. The property is offered under resale and is ready for immediate occupancy.::::Facility::::Residents of Nagarjuna Residency enjoy a wide range of premium amenities designed for a modern lifestyle. The community offers power backup, reserved parking, round the clock security, visitor parking, and intercom facilities for enhanced convenience and safety. Recreational amenities include jogging and strolling tracks, outdoor tennis courts, a health club with steam and Jacuzzi facilities, kids play pool with water slides, and guest accommodation. Additional conveniences such as laundry service and service lifts further elevate the quality of living, making this residence an excellent choice for families seeking comfort and luxury.::::Locality::::Located at Diamond Hills, Lumbini Avenue, Gachibowli, Hyderabad, the property enjoys proximity to major IT hubs and commercial centers. The apartment is situated opposite Nasr Boys School and is surrounded by reputed educational institutions, hospitals, shopping centers, restaurants, and entertainment zones. Excellent road connectivity and easy access to public transportation make commuting convenient. Gachibowli is one of Hyderabad's most sought after residential destinations, offering a perfect blend of urban convenience and peaceful living.
